story.iWant: to see extracted parameters in a preview pane when I select a file
story.soThat: I can understand what adjustments are in each preset before converting it

task.title: Implement Split-Pane Layout (AC-1)
task.subtask: Update Bubbletea Model struct to include preview pane fields
Create renderSplitView() function using Lipgloss JoinHorizontal
Implement terminal width detection and conditional rendering
Add unit tests for layout rendering

task.title: Extract and Display Parameters (AC-2)
task.subtask: Create parameter display templates using Lipgloss
Handle edge cases (empty recipe, partial recipe, metadata-only)
Add unit tests for parameter extraction and formatting

task.title: Real-Time Preview Updates (AC-3)
task.subtask: Update Model.Update() to handle cursor movement events
Add error handling for parse failures
Add unit tests for update logic

task.title: Format Detection and Metadata (AC-4)
task.subtask: Create formatMetadata(recipe *model.UniversalRecipe, format string) string function
Render metadata in preview pane header
Add unit tests for metadata extraction

task.title: Unmappable Parameter Warnings (AC-6)
task.subtask: Add unit tests for unmappable detection

task.title: Integration Testing
task.subtask: End-to-end TUI test with real sample files

task.title: Documentation
task.subtask: Update help overlay ('?' key) with preview-specific shortcuts
Add inline code comments for preview rendering logic
Update README.md with TUI preview features

criterion.title: Split-Pane Layout
criterion.requirement: TUI displays two-pane layout: file list (left) | parameter preview (right)
Panes split horizontally with 50/50 ratio by default
File list pane maintains all functionality from Story 4-1
Parameter preview pane appears on right side of terminal
Pane divider rendered with vertical line separator
Layout adapts to terminal resize (minimum 120 columns for split view)

criterion.title: Parameter Extraction and Display
criterion.requirement: When file selected, parse format and extract parameters to UniversalRecipe model
Display all non-zero parameters in preview pane
Group parameters by category: Basic Adjustments, Color, Temperature/Tint, HSL
Format numeric values with appropriate precision (floats: ±0.01, ints: whole numbers)
Omit parameters with zero/default values to reduce clutter
Show "No parameters" message if file has no adjustments

criterion.title: Real-Time Preview Updates
criterion.requirement: Parameter preview updates immediately when cursor moves to different file
Preview shows "Loading..." indicator while parsing file
Preview shows "Parse Error: <message>" if file is corrupted/invalid
Preview shows "(No adjustments)" if all parameters are zero/default
Navigation keys in file list trigger preview updates (arrow up/down)

criterion.title: Format Detection and Metadata Display
criterion.requirement: Preview pane header shows detected file format (NP3, XMP, lrtemplate)
Display file metadata: format version, preset name (if available)
Show source application (Adobe Lightroom, Nikon NX Studio, Capture One)
Display format-specific warnings (e.g., "NP3 uses approximate mappings")

criterion.title: Scrollable Preview for Long Parameter Lists
criterion.requirement: Preview pane scrolls if parameters exceed visible height
Scroll indicator shown when content extends beyond viewport ("▼ More")
j/k keys scroll preview pane when focused (or PageUp/PageDown)
Scroll position resets when switching to different file
Smooth scrolling with visual feedback

criterion.title: Unmappable Parameter Warnings
criterion.requirement: Detect parameters that don't map to target format (based on UniversalRecipe schema)
Highlight unmappable parameters with warning color (yellow/orange)
Show warning icon (⚠️) next to unmappable parameters
Display explanation tooltip/message for why parameter unmappable
Warning footer summarizes total unmappable parameters

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: Requirement: Show extracted parameters in TUI with side-by-side panes (file list | parameters). Updates when file selected, highlights unmappable parameters, scrollable for long parameter lists.

doc.title: Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: TUI provides interactive file browsing with live parameter preview, batch progress visualization, and visual validation before conversion. Built with Bubbletea framework for keyboard-driven workflows.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Bubbletea Elm Architecture (Model-Update-View) with Lipgloss styling. Terminal-native interface for power users. Uses v2 experimental branches with breaking changes from v1.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: TUI lives in cmd/tui/ as separate binary from CLI and WASM interfaces. Shares internal/converter and internal/models packages for conversion logic.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: UniversalRecipe struct contains 50+ parameters grouped by category: Basic Adjustments, Color, Temperature/Tint, HSL (8 colors). Preview display filters zero values to reduce clutter.

doc.title: Architecture Document
doc.snippet: Target preview update latency <100ms from cursor movement to display. Optimize with caching (parsed UniversalRecipe map), lazy loading (parse on select), and async parsing (Bubbletea Cmd pattern).

doc.title: Story 4.1 - Bubbletea File Browser
doc.snippet: Story 4-1 establishes base Model-Update-View pattern with file list, cursor, selection state. Story 4-2 extends Model with preview fields (showPreview, previewContent, scrollOffset). Maintains backwards compatibility.

artifact.reason: Core data structure for all photo editing parameters. Preview pane displays non-zero fields grouped by category (Basic, Color, Temp/Tint, HSL, etc.)
NP3 binary parser - extracts parameters to UniversalRecipe for preview display. Reused from Story 1-2.
XMP XML parser - extracts parameters to UniversalRecipe for preview display. Reused from Story 1-4.
lrtemplate Lua parser - extracts parameters to UniversalRecipe for preview display. Reused from Story 1-6.

technical.constraint: BLOCKS ON: Story 4-1 (Bubbletea File Browser) - Must be implemented first to provide Model, View, Update foundation
Must use Bubbletea v2 experimental (/v2 import paths) - API breaking changes from v1
Preview update latency target: <100ms from cursor movement to display update
Minimum terminal width for split view: 120 columns (40 file list + 40 preview + 40 margin)
Graceful degradation: Hide preview pane if terminal width < 120 columns (fallback to Story 4-1 layout)
Must work on Windows, macOS, Linux terminals with minimum 80x24 size
Zero-value filtering: Omit parameters with default values to reduce clutter (most presets adjust only 5-10 of 50+ fields)

architectural.constraint: Extend Story 4-1 Model - Add preview fields (showPreview, previewFile, previewContent, scrollOffset, previewCache)
Reuse existing parsers from Epic 1 - No new parser implementation needed (np3.Parse, xmp.Parse, lrtemplate.Parse)
Split-pane layout using Lipgloss JoinHorizontal - 50/50 width split by default
Preview caching strategy: map[string]*model.UniversalRecipe keyed by file path to avoid re-parsing on revisit
Async parsing with Bubbletea Cmd pattern - Parse in goroutine, update preview when complete
State immutability: Follow Bubbletea Elm Architecture - pure functions for Update/View

ui-ux.constraint: Parameter grouping: Basic Adjustments, Color, Temperature/Tint, HSL (8 colors), Tone Curve, Split Toning, Effects, Vignette
Format compatibility matrix: Detect unmappable parameters (e.g., NP3 Lens Correction has no XMP equivalent)
Warning color coding: Red (lost), Yellow (approximated), Green (direct mapping)
Loading states: Show "Loading..." indicator while parsing, "Parse Error" on failure, "(No adjustments)" for zero values
Scroll indicators: Show "▼ Scroll for more" when content exceeds viewport height
Terminal resize responsive: Recalculate split pane layout on WindowSizeMsg

performance.constraint: Expected parse times: XMP 5-10ms (XML), NP3 2-5ms (binary), lrtemplate 8-15ms (Lua) - total <100ms target
Preview cache effectiveness: Zero re-parsing when revisiting previously selected files
Performance testing: Must handle directories with 100+ files without lag

interface.name: extractParameters
interface.description: Detect file format from extension and call appropriate parser (np3.Parse, xmp.Parse, lrtemplate.Parse)

interface.name: formatParameters
interface.description: Group parameters by category, format numeric values, omit zero values, return multi-line display string

interface.name: formatMetadata
interface.description: Extract format-specific metadata (version, preset name, source application) for preview pane header

interface.name: detectUnmappableParams
interface.description: Check format compatibility matrix and identify parameters that won't map to target format

fields.field: showPreview bool - True when terminal width >= 120 columns
previewFile string - Currently previewed file path
previewContent string - Rendered parameter display text
scrollOffset int - Current scroll position in preview pane
viewportHeight int - Visible lines in preview pane
previewCache map[string]*model.UniversalRecipe - Parsed recipes by file path

interface.name: Keyboard events
interface.keys: Arrow Up/Down: Navigate file list and trigger preview update
j/k: Scroll preview pane (when preview focused)
Tab: Toggle focus between file list and preview pane

tests.standards:
Story 4-2 follows the same testing standards as Story 4-1 (Bubbletea File Browser):
- Unit tests for model logic using Go's testing package with table-driven test pattern - Test coverage target: 85% minimum for cmd/tui/ package - Integration tests with real sample files from examples/ and testdata/ directories - Manual cross-platform testing on Windows (PowerShell), macOS (Terminal.app), Linux (gnome-terminal) - Performance testing with 100+ file directories to verify <100ms preview update target - Visual inspection of terminal rendering (colors, alignment, spacing, indicators)
Testing framework: Go standard library testing package Mocking strategy: Mock file system access where needed, use real parsers with sample files CI/CD: Tests run in GitHub Actions on all platforms (Windows, macOS, Linux)

locations.location: cmd/tui/preview_test.go - Unit tests for preview pane rendering logic
cmd/tui/format_test.go - Unit tests for parameter formatting functions
cmd/tui/model_test.go - Extended tests for Model.Update() with preview events
examples/np3/ - 22 NP3 sample files for format detection and parameter extraction testing
examples/xmp/ - 913 XMP sample files for format detection and parameter extraction testing
examples/lrtemplate/ - 544 lrtemplate sample files for format detection and parameter extraction testing
testdata/xmp/ - Additional XMP test files for edge case validation

ideas.test-idea: TestSplitPaneLayout - Verify split view at 120, 140, 160 columns; test fallback at 80, 100 columns; verify pane width calculations
TestParameterExtraction - Test extractParameters() with XMP, NP3, lrtemplate files; verify UniversalRecipe population
TestParameterFormatting - Test formatParameters() grouping (Basic, Color, HSL); verify zero-value omission; test numeric precision
TestEdgeCases - Test empty recipe (all defaults), partial recipe (some params), metadata-only files
TestRealTimeUpdates - Test cursor movement triggers preview update; verify loading state transitions
TestPreviewCaching - Test cache hit/miss behavior; verify no re-parsing on revisit
TestErrorHandling - Test corrupted XMP (invalid XML), truncated NP3 (incomplete binary), empty lrtemplate
TestFormatDetection - Test detectFormat() returns correct format strings for .np3, .xmp, .lrtemplate extensions
TestMetadataExtraction - Verify format version, preset name, source application extraction from sample files
TestScrolling - Test scroll offset calculations; verify clamping behavior; test reset on file change
TestScrollIndicators - Test "▼ Scroll for more" display when content exceeds viewport
TestUnmappableDetection - Test NP3 → XMP warnings (Lens Correction); test XMP → lrtemplate warnings (Tone Curve); verify warning count accuracy
TestFormatCompatibilityMatrix - Verify parameter mapping rules across all format pairs
TestEndToEndPreview - Launch TUI with sample directory, navigate files, verify preview updates correctly
TestTerminalResize - Start at 120 cols, resize to 80 (preview hides), resize to 160 (preview shows)
TestLargeDirectory - Test with 100+ files, measure preview update latency (<100ms target)
TestCacheEffectiveness - Measure cache hit rate when navigating back and forth between files
